title: MREs
description: Adds immersive and realistic military MREs, which you can unpack and eat their contents.
body:
# 📦🌯 **MREs Mod By Timothaty** 🔫

### **WARNING: Mod will be no longer supporte**d

📑 This mod adds various MREs of different countries. They contain unique foods which can give you certain effects when eaten.
**Release**
# 
![screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ed185ebf5b86b1dceaf04c92ad3c151915ddf20.png)
# Mechanics ⚙
- To place any MRE, hold SHIFT and right click on any block you want.
- To unpack any MRE, hold SHIFT and right click it.
- You can't just eat cans, so you need to open them. To do so, you must hold in off-hand can opener item and in main hand the can you need to open and then right click to open it.
- Such items as povidlo (jam) you need to unpack using shears on the same principle as with canned food.
- You can cut some items in pieces like rye bread using Combat Knife.
- MREs leave after unpacking empty cardboard boxes. Really realistic.

# Planned Features 💡
- _Survival mode support_ **partially**
- French MRE
- Belarussian MRE
- IDF MRE (Israeli MRE)
- Serbian MRE
- _Bottled drinks_ **partially**
- Functional cardboard boxes

![0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b75a8ce99f5d0a3d4fe79248075ff98847923c80.png)

# Known Issues 🔥
No issues found yet.
  
### "Where I can report bugs?"
 You can tell me about them on my Discord server: [click!](https://discord.gg/53DH4f4K)
### "Will there be any updates?"
 Yes, they will be until I port mod to Java, Currently this mod made by MCreator and I want to fix it.
###  "Can I use this in my modpack?"
 Sure you can.
